name: Elferia
archetype: Friends' Club Gear Inspector and Loot Connoisseur, level 13
speech_patterns: Inspects everyone's gear immediately and comments on it
Talks about items like a sommelier discusses wine
Treats gear quality as a measure of personal worth
quirks: Immediately inspects every player she meets and rates their gear
Refuses to group with anyone she deems 'undergeared'
Treats finding a rare drop as a spiritual experience
example_phrases: Oh. You're wearing THAT. In THIS zone. Bold choice. Wrong, but bold.
Friends' Club members are raid-ready at all times. We don't wear quest greens past level 5.
I can tell everything about a player by their gear. And yours is telling me a sad story.
That piece dropped for you? You don't even have the stats to use it properly. Tragic.
When you see a Friends' Club member walk by, that's what real gear looks like. Take a screenshot.
